basics.name: Preston Garcia
basics.label: Student
basics.summary: I am currently studying at the University of Hawaii at Manoa for a B.S. in Computer Science with a minor in physics. I am planned to graduate in the Spring of 2023. I intend to grow my skills to eventually become a data scientist or a computational scientist to make a positive impact on the world.

education.institution: Leeward Community College, Pearl City, HI
education.area: Natural Sciences, Information and Communication Technology Focus

education.institution: University of Hawaii at Manoa, Honolulu, HI

work.summary: Tutor students in MATH classes up to MATH 244
highlights: Log students tutored onto spreadsheets.
Tutor students in Math courses taken before with textbooks if needed.
Work via Zoom due to COVID-19.

work.company: Leeward Community College Learning Resource Center
work.summary: Tutor students in classes that I was assigned to.
highlights: Tutor Leeward Community College students in ICS, JPN, and CHEM courses.
Hold review sessions if requested by professors.

volunteer.organization: Leeward Community College Hanai Ia Leeward
volunteer.summary: Create website for Hanai Ia Leeward and help out at food distributions
highlights: Helped distribute food to students who signed up.
Created website for Hanai Ia Leeward using Wix.
Organized canned food in slow hours.

volunteer.summary: Mentored high school students in FIRST Robotics
highlights: Helped programming subteam with programming problems and practices.
Guided lead in learning programming over summer.
Refereed FIRST Tech Challenge and FIRST Lego League competitions

volunteer.organization: Phi Theta Kappa Alpha Lambda Gamma Chapter
volunteer.position: Vice President of Fellowship and Secretary
volunteer.summary: Part of Leeward Community College's Phi Theta Kappa honors society's executive board
highlights: Organized Fellowship events for members.
Take notes on executive board meetings.
Assist in Honors in Action Project.

volunteer.organization: Phi Theta Kappa Alpha Lambda Gamma Chapter
volunteer.summary: President of Leeward Community College's Phi Theta Kappa honors society chapter
highlights: Lead any meetings/events for Alpha Lambda Gamma Chapter.
Take notes on executive board meetings.
Lead Honors in Action Project.

volunteer.summary: Part of UH Manoa's PANDA RIO
highlights: Attend weekly meetings during the semester.
Participate in practice algorithm problems and interviews.

volunteer.summary: Volunteer helping with TORCH's vision - Bridging the digital divide.
highlights: Host a monthly workshop.
Hold weekly coding sessions.
Create Discord server for event participants.

awards.title: Leeward Community College Honors Program
awards.summary: Awarded to students at Leeward Community College who pass an honors course(IS 250H) and attain a GPA at 3.7 or above.

awards.title: Phi Theta Kappa Hallmark Award
awards.summary: Awarded for being a distinguished Alpha Lambda Gamma chapter officer.
